title: Agent Run Envelope
description: Schema for an agent's execution run envelope.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the specific agent run.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the agent run in ISO 8601 format.

input_data.description: Input data provided to the agent.

output_data.description: Output data generated by the agent.

source_ref.description: Reference to the source of the agent run (e.g., commit SHA, build ID).

artifact_hash.description: Hash of the agent artifact that was executed.
